name: biweekly_one_on_one_03

input.subject: Updated: 1:1 Moving to Bi-Weekly
input.snippet: Hi, as we discussed, let's move our 1:1 to bi-weekly...
input.body_text:
Hi,

As we discussed, let's move our 1:1 meetings to bi-weekly (every other week) starting this month.

NEW SCHEDULE:
─────────────────────────────────
1:1 with Mark

Frequency: Every other Friday
Time: 3:00 PM - 3:30 PM
Location: Mark's office or Zoom

First meeting: Friday, February 13, 2026
Then: Feb 27, March 13, March 27, etc.
─────────────────────────────────

Zoom link (same as before):
https://zoom.us/j/markchen1on1

Agenda doc:
https://docs.google.com/d/xxx

I've updated the calendar invite. Please accept when you receive it.

Let me know if you have any questions.

Mark

--
Mark Chen
Senior Engineering Manager

notes: Bi-weekly (every other Friday) recurring 1:1 meeting — should extract with RRULE
